title: Market Phase 2 Schema
description: Higher-timeframe and contextual market facts used for interpretation. No execution or prediction.

previous_week_high.description: High of the last completed trading week

previous_week_low.description: Low of the last completed trading week

week_start.description: Start date of the previous completed week (IST)

week_end.description: End date of the previous completed week (IST)

computed_at.description: Timestamp when Phase-2 data was computed
